setup_pioneer_role.description: Automatically grants a pioneer role to the first 100 members

params.rolle: The role to assign to the first 100 members who joined

selfrole_erstellen.description: Starts the interactive setup wizard for a self-role panel

selfrole_loeschen.description: Deletes an existing self-role panel by message ID

params.panel_id: Message ID of the panel (right-click → Copy ID)

selfrole_liste.description: Shows all active self-role panels on this server

whitelist.description: Manages the list of allowed link domains

params.aktion: Choose action: Add, Remove or Show list

ban.description: Permanently bans a member from the server

params.grund: Reason for the ban (sent via DM)

kick.description: Kicks a member from the server

params.grund: Reason for the kick (sent via DM)

timeout.description: Puts a member in timeout for a specified duration

params.nutzer: The member to put in timeout
params.grund: Reason for the timeout (sent via DM)

warn.description: Warns a member and saves the warning

params.grund: Reason for the warning (sent via DM)

warn_edit.description: Edits or resets the warning count of a user

params.nutzer: The member whose warnings should be edited
params.anzahl: New total warning count (0 = delete all)

userinfo.description: Shows info about a member — admins can view others

params.nutzer: Admins only: member to view (leave empty = your own info)

set_log_channel.description: Sets the channel for moderation logs

params.kanal: Text channel where all moderation actions are logged

set_welcome_channel.description: Sets the channel for welcome messages

params.kanal: Text channel where new members are greeted

set_waiting_room.description: Configures the waiting room for support music

params.kanal: Voice channel where support music plays

setup_verify.description: Starts the interactive setup wizard for a verification panel

status_config.description: Starts the interactive bot status wizard

setup_tickets.description: Starts the interactive setup wizard for a ticket panel

ticket_edit.description: Starts the interactive ticket panel edit wizard

params.message_id: ID of the panel message (autocomplete available)

set_language.description: Changes the language of all bot texts and embeds

params.sprache: Language code: 'de' for German, 'en' for English

setup_application.description: Starts the interactive setup wizard for an application panel

params.message_id: Message ID of the panel (right-click → Copy ID)

set_join_roles.description: Starts the interactive auto join roles wizard

edit.description: Edit existing panels (Tickets, Self-Roles, Applications, Verify)

adminpanel.description: Opens the admin panel for user and chat management

config_export.description: Exports the server configuration as a JSON file

config_import.description: Imports a config file and migrates all panels

music_upload.description: Uploads a new music file for the waiting room

music_download.description: Downloads the current waiting room music

history.description: Shows the server audit log with filter options

params.filter: Only show actions of this type (e.g. ban, warn)
params.action: Only show a specific action (e.g. ban, warn, setup_tickets)
params.user: Only show actions by this user (name, mention or ID)
params.date: Filter by date or month (e.g. 2026-03 or 2026-03-15)

help.description: Shows all available commands and how to use the bot

modals.ticket_close_placeholder: e.g. Issue resolved, no response received...
modals.app_decision_placeholder: e.g. Congratulations! / Unfortunately we cannot accept your application...
modals.app_setup_role_ph: e.g. @Staff or 123456789 — leave empty = no filter
modals.app_setup_q_label_ph: e.g. Why do you want to be staff?
modals.app_setup_section_ph: e.g. Personal Info — leave empty to clear
modals.ticket_setup_embed_desc_ph: e.g. Need help? Select a category...
modals.ticket_setup_embed_color_ph: e.g. FFD700 for Gold, 5865F2 for Blurple
modals.embed_gen_color_ph: e.g. FF0000 for Red, 5865F2 for Blurple

selects.status_dnd_desc: Bot appears as do not disturb
selects.delete_type_ph: 🗑️ What do you want to delete?
selects.edit_type_ph: ✏️ What do you want to edit?
selects.admin_type_ph: ⚙️ What do you want to manage?
selects.setup_ph: ⚙️ What do you want to set up?

errors.delete_nothing_found: ℹ️ No deletable panels found on this server.

errors.wizard_missing_channel: ❌ Please select a **review channel** first (📢 Review Channel).
errors.wizard_missing_roles: ❌ Please select at least one **supporter role** (👥 Supporter Roles).

errors.wizard_missing_categories: ❌ Please add at least one **category** (➕ Add Category).

errors.wizard_missing_selfroles: ❌ Please add at least one **role** (➕ Add Role).
errors.edit_discord_update_failed: ⚠️ Config saved, but the Discord message could not be updated:
errors.config_export_empty: ℹ️ No configuration found for this server.
errors.config_rollback_no_perm: ❌ Only administrators can undo the import.
errors.music_too_large: ❌ File too large. Maximum 25 MB allowed.
errors.music_not_found: ❌ No music file found. Please upload one first.
errors.history_empty: ℹ️ No entries found for this server.

ticket_channel.title: 📂 Ticket Channel: {category}
ticket_channel.desc:
All tickets of category **{category}** are managed here.

⚠️ **Note:** You cannot write here directly. Your ticket will be created as a private thread.

ticket_thread.title: 🎫 Ticket #{id} — {category}
ticket_thread.desc:
Welcome {mention}!

Your ticket has been created. Please describe your issue as **detailed as possible**.
ticket_thread.next_steps_val:
**1.** Describe your issue
**2.** Attach screenshots
**3.** Wait for a supporter

ticket_panel.title: 🎫 Support Tickets
ticket_panel.desc:
Need help?

Select a category from the dropdown menu and we'll assist you as soon as possible! 🙂

dm_ticket_created.title: 🎫 Ticket Successfully Created
dm_ticket_created.desc: your ticket has been created. A supporter will get back to you as soon as possible. Please be patient. 🙂

dm_ticket_claimed.title: 📋 Ticket Claimed
dm_ticket_claimed.desc: your ticket has been claimed by a supporter. You will receive a response shortly. 🙂

dm_ticket_closed.title: 🔒 Ticket Closed
dm_ticket_closed.desc: your ticket has been closed and archived. You can open a new ticket at any time.

log_link.title: 🚫 Link Deleted
log_link.desc: An unauthorized link was removed in {channel}.

log_ban.title: 🔨 Member Banned
log_ban.desc: A member was permanently removed from the server.

log_kick.title: 👢 Member Kicked
log_kick.desc: A member was kicked from the server.

log_warn.title: ⚠️ Warning #{count}
log_warn.desc: A member has been officially warned.

log_warn_edit.title: 🔧 Warnings Edited
log_warn_edit.desc: The warning count was manually adjusted.

dm_ban.title: 🔨 You have been banned
dm_ban.desc: you have been permanently removed from the server. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact an administrator.

dm_kick.title: 👢 You have been kicked
dm_kick.desc: you have been kicked. You can rejoin at any time using an invite link.

dm_timeout.title: ⏳ You have been timed out
dm_timeout.desc: you have been temporarily muted and cannot write on **{server}** until {until}.

dm_warn.title: ⚠️ You have received a warning
dm_warn.desc: you have been officially warned. Please follow the server rules to avoid further consequences.

welcome.title: 👋 Welcome to {server}!
welcome.desc:
Hey {mention}, great to have you here!

Check out the rules and channels and make yourself at home. 🏠

selfrole.list_desc: There are **{count}** panel(s) on this server.

verify_panel.default_desc: Click the button below to verify yourself and gain access to the server.

application.default_desc:
Want to become part of our team?

Click **Apply Now** and fill out the form. You will be guided through all questions step by step.

> ⚠️ Answer all questions completely and honestly.
application.dm_desc: Your application was submitted successfully. Our team will review it as soon as possible. Please be patient. 🙂
application.dm_accepted_desc: your application has been accepted. Welcome to the team! 🎉
application.dm_declined_desc: unfortunately your application has been declined. You may apply again at a later time.
application.dm_question_desc: the team has a question about your application. Please respond as soon as possible.
application.question_thread_desc:
{mention}, a supporter has a follow-up question about your application.

{reviewer} will be helping you.

delete_wizard.title: {emoji} Delete {label}
delete_wizard.desc: {count} panel(s) found. Select one to delete:

log_language.title: 🌐 Language Changed
log_language.desc: The server language was set to **{lang}**.

log_config_export.title: 📥 Config Exported
log_config_export.desc: The server configuration was downloaded as a JSON file.

log_config_rollback.title: ↩️ Config Import Rolled Back
log_config_rollback.desc: The last config import was rolled back. {errors} error(s).

admin_panel.title: ⚙️ Admin Panel
admin_panel.user_desc: Select a user using the button below.
admin_panel.user_selected:
Selected user: **{user}**

Use the buttons to perform an action.
admin_panel.chat_desc: Use the buttons to manage the current channel.
admin_panel.user_select_desc: Select a member from the dropdown:

setup.title: ⚙️ Setup Wizard
setup.desc: Select from the dropdown what you want to set up:
setup.language_hint: Choose the bot language for this server:
setup.channel_hint: Select a channel from the dropdown:

embed_gen.title: ⚙️ Embed Generator
embed_gen.comp_choose_desc: Do you want to add **Link Buttons** (up to 5, clickable links) or a **Dropdown Menu** (up to 25 options)?

info.title: 🤖 Bexi Bot
info.desc: A versatile Discord bot with ticket system, moderation, applications, self-roles and more.
info.features_val:
🎫 Ticket system with categories & threads
🛡️ Moderation (Ban, Kick, Timeout, Warn)
✅ Verification panels
🎭 Self-role panels
📋 Application system
🎨 Embed generator
📋 Audit log (SQLite)
🌐 Multi-language (DE / EN)

help.user_desc: Here is an overview of all features available to you on this server.
help.admin_desc: Overview of all admin commands. Use `/setup` to configure all features via the wizard.
help.cmd_userinfo: Show your own or another member's info
help.cmd_setup: Universal setup wizard — configure everything from one menu
help.cmd_edit: Edit existing panels (Tickets, Self-Roles, Applications, Verify)
help.cmd_ticket_edit: Edit a ticket panel (title, description, color)
help.cmd_ban: Permanently ban a member from the server
help.cmd_kick: Kick a member from the server
help.cmd_timeout: Put a member in timeout for a set duration
help.cmd_warn: Warn a member and log the warning
help.cmd_warn_edit: Edit or reset a member's warning count
help.cmd_adminpanel: Open the admin panel (User & Chat management)
help.cmd_config_export: Export the server config as a JSON file
help.cmd_config_import: Import a config and recreate all panels
help.cmd_history: View the server audit log with filters
help.cmd_music_upload: Upload a new waiting room music file
help.cmd_music_download: Download the current waiting room music
help.cmd_pioneer: Assign a pioneer role to the first 100 members
help.tickets_user_desc:
Open a ticket by clicking the dropdown in the ticket channel.
A private thread will be created — describe your issue and a supporter will respond.
help.applications_user_desc:
Click **Apply Now** on an application panel to start your application.
You will be guided step by step through all questions.
help.selfroles_user_desc:
Select your roles in the self-roles panel using the dropdown.
You can pick multiple roles at once — ✅ marks roles you already have.
help.verify_user_desc: Click the **Verify** button in the verification channel to gain access to the server.
help.footer_admin: {name} • Admin Help — use /setup to configure features
